subcodes.first_line: O Sign of the Ever-Living, All-Sustaining Lord! Like unto the sun that rendeth asunder the veil of clouds, from the horizon of lights two verses have become manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آیت رحمن حی قیوم چون شمس خرق حجاب غیوم فرمود از مطلع انوار دو ایات ظاهر و
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @material world a reflection of the spiritual, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
